dict.string: macos-mcp reads and creates calendar events for its MCP calendar tools.
macos-mcp reads and creates calendar events for its MCP calendar tools.
macos-mcp reads Apple Notes and Reminders via AppleScript for its MCP tools.
macos-mcp searches Contacts to resolve names to phone numbers and emails.
macos-mcp lists reminders for its MCP tools.
macos-mcp lists reminders for its MCP tools.
